question: Wireless Evil Twin
canonical_answer:
Unauthorized wireless access point that could become a potential backdoor

Prevented by using 802.1X (Network Access Control) so that you must authenticate regardless of connection type

appears_in.title: Comptia Exam Objectives Security+
appears_in.answer: Attack involves an attacker setting up a fraudulent wireless access point
